channel.title: GitHub Astro Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Astro in GitHub

item.title: RyanFitzgerald/devportfolio
item.description: A modern, minimalist portfolio template built with Astro and Tailwind CSS. Perfect for developers looking to showcase their skills, experience, and projects in a clean, professional way.

item.title: bitbonsai/mcpvault
item.description: A lightweight Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for safe Obsidian vault access

item.title: NebulaServices/Nebula
item.description: a stunning and sleek web proxy with support for hundreds of popular sites.

item.title: themefisher/bookworm-light-astro
item.description: Bookworm Light is a feature-rich, minimal, highly customizable, easy-to-use Astro blog theme.

item.title: saicaca/fuwari
item.description: ✨A static blog template built with Astro.

item.title: ibelick/ui-skills
item.description: A growing set of skills to polish interfaces built by agents.

item.title: markhorn-dev/astro-nano
item.description: Astro Nano is a static, minimalist, lightweight, lightning fast portfolio and blog.

item.title: JustGoodUI/dante-astro-theme
item.description: Dante, a single-author blog and portfolio theme for Astro.js.

item.title: Lissy93/awesome-privacy
item.description: 🦄 A curated list of privacy & security-focused software and services

item.title: arthelokyo/astrowind
item.description: ⭕️ AstroWind: A free template using Astro 5 and Tailwind CSS. Astro starter theme.
